title: Constraint Family / Formula
description: Versioned constraint families that describe invariant/metric interactions and tier-sensitive bands, referenced by spine triple entries.

constraintId.description: Stable identifier for this constraint family (e.g., CIC_AOS_DET_cap_v1).

version.description: Semantic version of this constraint definition (e.g., 1.0.0).

appliesTo.description: Logical target: invariant, metric, pair, or composite.

inputs.description: Names of invariants and/or metrics used as inputs to this constraint.

outputField.description: Name of the invariant or metric primarily constrained (e.g., DET, ARR, CDL).

symbolicForm.description: Human-readable symbolic description of the constraint (e.g., "DET <= f(CIC, AOS)" or "ARR = min(UEC_norm, DET_norm) / max(UEC_norm, DET_norm)").

tiers.description: Tiers for which this constraint is active.

parameters.description: Optional parameterization of the constraint (e.g., coefficients, thresholds, bands).

telemetryBinding.description: Declares how telemetry should be emitted or interpreted for this constraint.

envelopeSchemaRef.description: Schema $id for the telemetry envelope that carries measurements related to this constraint.

fields.description: Names of telemetry fields that carry evaluated values or violations.

violationSeverityField.description: Optional field that encodes severity of a constraint violation.

reviewPolicy.description: For review-threshold constraints, describes what should happen when the condition is triggered.

routeToRepos.description: Repositories that must be notified or involved in review.

requiresDeadLedgerRef.description: Whether review records must be anchored in Dead-Ledger for this constraint.

notes.description: Additional notes, calibration status, or open research questions for this constraint family.
